시편 149:1.content: Praise Yahweh! Sing to Yahweh a new song, his praise in the assembly of the saints.

시편 149:2.content: Let Israel rejoice in him who made them. Let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

시편 149:3.content: Let them praise his name in the dance! Let them sing praises to him with tambourine and harp!

시편 149:4.content: For Yahweh takes pleasure in his people. He crowns the humble with salvation.

시편 149:5.content: Let the saints rejoice in honor. Let them sing for joy on their beds.

시편 149:6.content: May the high praises of God be in their mouths, and a two-edged sword in their hand,

시편 149:7.content: to execute vengeance on the nations, and punishments on the peoples;

시편 149:8.content: to bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

시편 149:9.content: to execute on them the written judgment. All his saints have this honor. Praise Yah!
